timeline.title: The Stairwell Incident & Anaya's Fall
timeline.novel: The Shadow That Followed (Verma Saga Book 01)
timeline.description: Chronological Position #1 (Confirmed Order). Rhea uncovers the pen drive containing the unedited CCTV footage of the night Anaya fell down the stairwell, shattering Aarav Verma's initial confession.

timeline.title: Aarav's Drowning Guilt & Confession
timeline.novel: The Shadow Who Watched (Verma Saga Book 02)
timeline.description: Chronological Position #2. Written from inside Aarav's cracked mind as he replays the night of the stairwell tragedy and blames himself under constant surveillance.

timeline.title: The Enigmatic Alleyway Murder in Mumbai
timeline.description: Detective Arjun Mehra stands at the edge of a chilling moonlight murder scene in Mumbai, unearthing dark archives and cross-universe criminal seeds.

timeline.title: Memory Implants & The Edge of Memory
timeline.description: Explores quantum memory distortions: 'She said, You will forget me. He never wanted to.' Characters realize their memories were synthetic implants.

timeline.title: Lethal Devotion & Dark Campus Secrets
timeline.description: High-octane obsession where passionate devotion crosses into mortal danger, connecting campus secret societies to the NNU.

timeline.title: Self-Discovery & Friendship Healing
timeline.description: A journey of love, deep bonds, and emotional recovery for characters surviving the psychological trauma of the universe.

timeline.title: Forgotten Diaries & The Flavours of Fate
timeline.description: Haunting memories and forgotten diaries bind all 7 standalone stories, multiverse threads, and character registries into the grand NNU Crossover Mode.

nodes.label: The Shadow That Followed
nodes.summary: Verma Saga Book 01 (Chronological #1). Rhea's discovery of the unedited pen drive.
nodes.bio: To the ones who saw everything and stayed quiet anyway—may you find the courage to break the script before it breaks you. The night remembers who stood on the stairs.

nodes.label: The Shadow Who Watched
nodes.summary: Verma Saga Book 02 (Chronological #2). Aarav's cracked confession.
nodes.bio: For the ones who still replay that one night in their head and blame themselves. Silence was never protection—it was only delay.

nodes.label: False Memories Vol. 1
nodes.summary: The Edge of Memory – what if your memories were never yours to begin with.
nodes.bio: She said, 'You'll forget me.' He never wanted to. A psychological suspense novel into quantum memory implants and multiverse theory.

nodes.label: Whispers of Shadows
nodes.summary: Detective Arjun Mehra Chronicles: Unveiling the Enigma.
nodes.bio: In the heart of Mumbai, Detective Arjun Mehra investigates an enigmatic murder scene under moonlit alleyways.

nodes.label: JUNOON: Love Ya Death
nodes.summary: High-octane romantic suspense and lethal obsession.
nodes.bio: A story where passionate devotion crosses into mortal danger and dark campus secrets.

nodes.label: Dosti Aur Dil
nodes.summary: A Journey of Love, Friendship, and Self-Discovery.
nodes.bio: An emotional narrative of healing, deep family bonds, and self-discovery following psychological trauma.

nodes.label: FATEFUL FLAVOURS
nodes.summary: Haunting memories, forgotten diaries, and the flavours of fate.
nodes.bio: The grand NNU convergence novel where forgotten diaries bind all 7 standalone stories into Crossover Mode.

nodes.label: Rhea Kapoor
nodes.summary: Protagonist of The Shadow That Followed.
nodes.bio: Discovers the pen drive containing unedited footage of the night Anaya fell, exposing the Verma family edits.

nodes.label: Aarav Verma
nodes.summary: Central narrator of The Shadow Who Watched.
nodes.bio: A boy drowning in guilt and memory distortions who believed he caused the stairwell tragedy.

nodes.label: St. Jude Stairwell
nodes.summary: The origin point of the Verma Saga.
nodes.bio: The moonlit stairwell where Anaya fell and CCTV footage was edited.

nodes.label: Detective Arjun Mehra
nodes.summary: Lead detective in Whispers of Shadows.
nodes.bio: Relentless investigator probing Mumbai dark alleyway crime archives.
